3.title: Duration
3.query:
timeseries duration = avg(dt.synthetic.http.duration),
  by: { dt.entity.http_check }
| fieldsAdd http_check_name = entityName(dt.entity.http_check)
| sort arrayAvg(duration) desc
| limit 20

5.title: Data explorer results
5.query:
timeseries response_time = avg(dt.service.request.response_time),
  by: { dt.entity.service }
| fieldsAdd service_name = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| sort arrayAvg(response_time) desc
| limit 10

6.title: Data explorer results
6.query:
timeseries count = avg(dt.service.request.count),
  by: { dt.entity.service }
| fieldsAdd service_name = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 10
